languages.text: "Как говорил мой предок, даже обреченного можно спасти, ибо в благодарности своей он свершит великие дела".
"As my ancestor once said: even the doomed are worth saving, for their debt of gratitude leads to grand deeds."
languages.original_text: "Как говорил мой предок, даже обреченного можно спасти, ибо в благодарности своей он свершит великие дела".

traits.locale_text: "As my ancestor used to say: even the doomed are worth saving, for their debt of gratitude leads to grand deeds."
"As my ancestor used to say: even the doomed are worth saving, for their debt of gratitude leads to grand deeds."
"As my ancestor once said: even the doomed are worth saving, for their debt of gratitude leads to grand deeds."
"As my ancestor once said: even the doomed are worth saving, for their debt of gratitude leads to grand deeds."
"As my ancestor once said: even the doomed are worth saving, for their debt of gratitude leads to grand deeds."

languages.text: “正如我的先祖所说，哪怕是注定没救的人也值得一救，因为他们的感念之情会催生出伟大的功业来。”
languages.original_text: "As my ancestor once said: even the doomed are worth saving, for their debt of gratitude leads to grand deeds."

traits.locale_text: “正如我的先祖所说，哪怕是注定没救的人也值得一救，因为他们的感念之情会催生出伟大的功业来。”

languages.text: "Atamın bir zamanlar dediği gibi... Mahkûm olanlar bile kurtarılmaya değerdir çünkü minnet borçları, onları büyük işler yapmaya yöneltir."
languages.original_text: "As my ancestor once said: even the doomed are worth saving, for their debt of gratitude leads to grand deeds."

traits.locale_text: "Atamın bir zamanlar dediği gibi... Mahkûm olanlar bile kurtarılmaya değerdir çünkü minnet borçları, onları büyük işler yapmaya yöneltir."

languages.text: « Comme le disait mon ancêtre : si vous octroyez la rédemption à un damné, il sera enclin à accomplir de grandes choses pour payer sa dette. »
languages.original_text: "As my ancestor once said: even the doomed are worth saving, for their debt of gratitude leads to grand deeds."

traits.locale_text: « Comme le disait mon ancêtre : si vous octroyez la rédemption à un damné, il sera enclin à accomplir de grandes choses pour payer sa dette. »

languages.text: «Como dijo mi antepasado, incluso los condenados merecen la salvación, pues su gratitud conduce a grandes proezas».
languages.original_text: "As my ancestor once said: even the doomed are worth saving, for their debt of gratitude leads to grand deeds."

traits.locale_text: «Como dijo mi antepasado, incluso los condenados merecen la salvación, pues su gratitud conduce a grandes proezas».

languages.text: "Wie mein Ahnherr einst sagte: Selbst die Verlorenen sind es wert, gerettet zu werden, denn ihre Dankbarkeit veranlasst sie zu großen Taten."
languages.original_text: "As my ancestor once said: even the doomed are worth saving, for their debt of gratitude leads to grand deeds."

traits.locale_text: "Wie mein Ahnherr einst sagte: Selbst die Verlorenen sind es wert, gerettet zu werden, denn ihre Dankbarkeit veranlasst sie zu großen Taten."

languages.text: 「我が祖先がかつて言ったように――滅びの定めにある者でさえ、救う価値はある。その恩義が、偉大なる行いへとつながるのだから」
languages.original_text: "As my ancestor once said: even the doomed are worth saving, for their debt of gratitude leads to grand deeds."

traits.locale_text: 「我が祖先がかつて言ったように――滅びの定めにある者でさえ、救う価値はある。その恩義が、偉大なる行いへとつながるのだから」
